lectionary.gospelTitle: Lazarus Is Raised from the Dead

readings.summary: The Lord promises to raise his people from the dead.

readings.citation:
Ps 130:1-2, 3-4, 5-6, 7-8. R. v.7
With the Lord there is mercy and fullness of redemption.
readings.antiphon:
Ps 130:1-2, 3-4, 5-6, 7-8. R. v.7
With the Lord there is mercy and fullness of redemption.

readings.summary: The Spirit of God dwells in us.

I am the resurrection and the life, says the Lord;
whoever believes in me, even if he dies, will never die.
Jesus raises Lazarus from the dead.

antiphons.text:
Give me justice, O God,
and plead my cause against a nation that is faithless.
From the deceitful and cunning rescue me,
for you, O God, are my strength.

Everyone who lives and believes in me
will not die for ever, says the Lord.

gathering.title: Gather Us in Mercy, Lord
gathering.composer: Gabe Huck • Adapted and Arr. by Tony Alonso
